mapper.select: SELECT IFNULL(tPSTP.liveIPKey, tPSTP.profileKey) AS artistIP, tPST.cardBackgroundColor AS groupColor FROM dstore.tblProductStarTalkProfile tPSTP LEFT JOIN tblProductStarTalk tPST ON tPSTP.productID = tPST.productID WHERE tPSTP.staruseridx = #{starUserIdx} AND tPSTP.useFlag = 1 AND tPSTP.deleteFlag= 0 AND tPSTP.deleteDT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' ORDER BY tPSTP.regDT desc LIMIT 1

SELECT tLITL.count, tLITL.usedCount FROM dstore.tblLiveItemTransactionLog AS tLITL JOIN dstore.tblUserLiveItemInfo tULII ON tLITL.useridx = tULII.useridx AND tLITL.productID = tULII.productID JOIN dstore.tblProductLiveItem AS tPLI ON tLITL.productID = tPLI.productID AND tULII.appGroup = tPLI.appGroup JOIN dstore.tblProductStarTalkProfile AS tPSTP ON (tPLI.starTalkProductID = tPSTP.productID AND tPSTP.staruseridx = #{starUserIdx}) WHERE tLITL.useridx = #{userIdx} AND tLITL.transactionType = 'c' AND tLITL.expireDT > now() AND tULII.appGroup = #{appGroup} AND tULII.useFlag = 1 AND tPSTP.useFlag = 1 AND tPSTP.deleteFlag= 0 AND tPSTP.deleteDT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' AND (tULII.deleteDT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' OR tULII.deleteDT IS NULL) AND (tPLI.deleteDT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' OR tPLI.deleteDT IS NULL) ORDER BY tLITL.count - tLITL.usedCount desc LIMIT 1

SELECT tLITL.idx, tLITL.count, tLITL.usedCount, tLITL.useridx, tLITL.staruseridx, tLITL.liveID, tLITL.productID , tLITL.orderID, tLITL.OSCode, tLITL.transactionType, tLITL.regDT, tLITL.updateDT, tLITL.expireDT FROM dstore.tblLiveItemTransactionLog AS tLITL JOIN dstore.tblUserLiveItemInfo tULII ON tLITL.useridx = tULII.useridx AND tLITL.productID = tULII.productID JOIN dstore.tblProductLiveItem AS tPLI ON tLITL.productID = tPLI.productID AND tULII.appGroup = tPLI.appGroup JOIN dstore.tblProductStarTalkProfile AS tPSTP ON (tPLI.starTalkProductID = tPSTP.productID AND tPSTP.staruseridx = #{starUserIdx}) WHERE tLITL.useridx = #{userIdx} AND tLITL.transactionType = 'c' AND tLITL.expireDT > now() AND tULII.appGroup = #{appGroup} AND tULII.useFlag = 1 AND tPSTP.useFlag = 1 AND tPSTP.deleteFlag= 0 AND tPSTP.deleteDT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' AND (tULII.deleteDT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' OR tULII.deleteDT IS NULL) AND (tPLI.deleteDT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' OR tPLI.deleteDT IS NULL) AND tLITL.count - tLITL.usedCount > 0 ORDER BY expireDT, regDT LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dstore.tblLiveItemTransactionLog ( pIdx, count, usedCount, useridx, staruseridx, liveID, productID, orderID, OSCode, transactionType, regDT, updateDT, expireDT ) VALUES ( #{idx}, -1, 0, #{useridx}, #{staruseridx}, #{liveID}, #{productID}, #{orderID}, #{OSCode}, 'o', now(), now(), '0000-00-00 00:00:00' )
mapper.select: SELECT tP.productID, tPO.optionID, tPLI.starTalkProductID, replace(IFNULL(#{msg},'0회권'), '0' ,tLU.availableCount) as optionName , CASE WHEN (tPOP.eventDiscountStartDT <= now() AND tPOP.eventDiscountEndDT >= now() AND tPOP.eventDiscountPrice > 0) THEN tPOP.eventDiscountPrice ELSE tPOP.salePrice END AS salePrice FROM dstore.tblProduct AS tP LEFT JOIN dstore.tblProductLiveItem AS tPLI ON (tP.productID = tPLI.productID AND tP.appGroup = tPLI.appGroup) LEFT JOIN dstore.tblProductStarTalkProfile AS tPSTP ON (tPLI.starTalkProductID = tPSTP.productID AND tPSTP.staruseridx = #{starUserIdx}) LEFT JOIN dstore.tblProductOption AS tPO ON (tP.productID = tPO.productID AND tP.appGroup = tPO.appGroup) LEFT JOIN dstore.tblProductOptionPrice AS tPOP ON (tPO.optionID = tPOP.optionID) LEFT JOIN dstore.tblLiveUnit AS tLU ON (tPOP.OSCode = tLU.OSCode AND tPOP.liveUnitIDX = tLU.liveUnitIDX AND tP.appGroup = tLU.appGroup AND tP.exposureFlag = tLU.exposureFlag) WHERE tP.productType=5 AND tP.paymentType = 1 AND tP.productStatus = 1 AND tP.appGroup = #{appGroup} AND (tPO.limitCNTFlag = 0 OR (tPO.limitCNTFlag = 1 AND tPO.stockCNT >= 1)) AND tPOP.OSCode = 'ALL' AND tP.exposureFlag = 1 AND tPSTP.useFlag = 1 AND tPSTP.deleteFlag= 0 AND ((tLU.serviceStartDT <= now() AND tLU.serviceEndDT >= now()) OR (tLU.serviceEndDT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00')) AND tP.deleteDT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' AND (tPLI.deleteDT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' OR tPLI.deleteDT IS NULL) AND tPO.deleteDT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' AND tPOP.deleteDT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' AND (tLU.deleteDT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' OR tLU.deleteDT IS NULL) AND tPSTP.deleteDT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' ORDER BY CAST(tLU.availableCount AS unsigned)

select staruseridx, starUser.nickname from (select * from dstore.tblProduct where productStatus in ('2', '7') and appGroup = #{appGroup} and exposureFlag = 1 and productType = '4') as product inner join (select * from dstore.tblProductStarTalkProfile where useFlag = 1 and deleteFlag = 0 and isLiveEnable = 1) as starUser on product.productID = starUser.productID
